market_blurb: Katy, Texas has grown into a thriving Houston suburb driven by energy sector employment, retail and distribution centers, and a strong healthcare and education presence anchored by Katy ISD. Rapid residential development, including large master-planned communities, continues to fuel construction and real estate activity in the area. This diverse economic base supports a steady influx of new homeowners and businesses each year.
local_note: Katy's humid Gulf Coast climate and rapid expansion of new-construction subdivisions create ongoing pressure from termites, mosquitoes, and fire ants that local pest control providers must address year-round.
